spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID. Tight gaps (gap-6). Every pixel utilized. h-full on children.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: MODE A: THE 'TETRIS' GRID for the Customer QR ordering landing page. Asymmetry, visual tension.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-xl for inner widgets. Organic, smooth edges.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(42,58,44,0.04)] for hovering cards, flat default with 1px border.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and enhanced shadow. Buttons must explicitly set text color on hover (hover:text-white).
motion_and_interactions.page_load: framer-motion for staggered entrance of dashboard cards and menu items.

components.buttons: Rounded-full or rounded-xl. High contrast. Primary uses Terracotta (#C05C3D), Secondary uses Forest Green (#2A3A2C).
components.cards: Flat background (#FFFFFF), 1px subtle border (#E6E5DF), no shadow by default. Hover adds slight lift and shadow.
components.sidebar: Dark mode sidebar (#1A251E) with white/muted text for contrast against the light dashboard (#F9F9F7). Glassmorphism on mobile.
components.tables: Shadcn tables. Minimalist, no vertical borders, generous row padding (py-4).
components.modals: Glassmorphism overlays (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40). Modal body is solid #FFFFFF, rounded-2xl.
components.qr_ordering_page: Mobile-first, masonry or bento layout for categories. High quality images with subtle gradient overlays for text readability. Bottom sticky cart bar.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over images must use gradient overlay. Hover and focus states must have higher contrast.

image_urls.description: Wide-angle photograph of a modern high-end restaurant interior at golden hour, warm ambient lighting reflecting off polished wood tables and stone walls.
Sophisticated luxury restaurant interior featuring elegant chandeliers.
Minimalist modern restaurant logo featuring an abstract geometric cloche and fork, terracotta and dark forest green colors.
Gourmet beautifully plated dish top down view.
Elegant cocktail in a crystal glass on a polished walnut bar counter.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all text is in Azerbaijani as explicitly requested by the user.
Do not use generic fonts for headings (like Inter or Roboto). Apply Google Fonts 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body.
Make the fonts smaller and better proportioned compared to the previous chaotic design. Follow the scale rules strictly. Never use text-7xl or above.
The UI should feel modern, clean, and era-reflecting (müasir, səliqəli, dövrümüzü əks etdirən) with high-end luxury hospitality vibes.
For the Customer QR ordering page, focus on a mobile-first, visual-heavy design using the food images and bento/masonry grid. Add a sticky cart bar at the bottom.
Implement the Sidebars for the Owner, Admin, Waiter, and Kitchen dashboards using the dark #1A251E background to contrast heavily with the light main area #F9F9F7.
Avoid card-heavy designs everywhere. Use pure HTML/Tailwind to create neat bento grids with 1px soft borders rather than massive drop shadows.
Always add data-testid to interactive elements.
